# ClawLite

> One click to install OpenClaw with cheaper tokens.

## Canonical
- https://clawlite.ai/

## Core Pages
- https://clawlite.ai/
- https://clawlite.ai/setup
- https://clawlite.ai/docs
- https://clawlite.ai/troubleshoot
- https://clawlite.ai/blog

## Product Summary
ClawLite helps users install and run OpenClaw with a UI-first flow and no terminal required for standard onboarding.

## Contact
- hello@clawlite.ai
